description: In this video, Mike discusses the Orca protocol, a core liquidity layer on Solana, highlighting its unique features for traders, liquidity providers, and builders.
topic_summary: Mike explains Orca's role as a liquidity layer on Solana, focusing on its benefits for traders [t=12:00], liquidity providers [t=15:04], and developers [t=19:76]. He encourages viewers to explore Orca and integrate it into their projects [t=36:10].
